category_sources: source_facts.description says SourceKitten is a framework and command-line tool for interacting with SourceKit; official README describes parsing Swift AST, docs, syntax, and more.
display_name_sources: Official jpsim/SourceKitten README and reference docs use the display name "SourceKitten".
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents command-line usage; jpsim.com hosts generated SourceKitten reference documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/SourceDocs/SourceDocs; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, official README, and jpsim reference docs describe SourceKit interaction, Swift source analysis, docs extraction, CLI, and framework usage.
